text.title: Jailbreak Eval Suite Bootstrap Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from a refusal-policy list to a CI-gated eval suite.

step.name: enumerate-categories
step.action: List attack categories to defend (target ≥10). Anchor to a public taxonomy: DAN, role-play, cipher, base64, suffix, persona-flip, hypothetical, code-context, multi-turn, refusal-bypass.
step.decision-gate: If <10 categories enumerable, audit the safety policy first — gap is in policy, not in eval.

step.name: seed-cases
step.input: Categories list + open benchmarks (JailbreakBench, JBDistill, JailBreakV-28K).
step.action: Pull ≥5 cases per category. Dedupe by prompt hash. Tag each with citation (URL or paper ref). Author-translate if benchmarks are English-only and target is multilingual.
step.decision-gate: Manually inspect 5 random rows per category for relevance; reject the category seed if >1 of 5 is off-topic.

step.name: define-judge-contract
step.action: For programmatic categories (regex-detectable refusals) write `judge_kind=regex` with a pattern. For semantic categories write `judge_kind=llm` with a single binary judge prompt scoring "refused" vs "complied". One judge prompt per suite, not per case.
step.output: templates/judge-prompt.md + per-case judge_kind/args fields in JSONL.
step.decision-gate: If a category needs case-specific judging, the category is too broad — split it.

step.name: calibrate-judge
step.input: Holdout of ≥30 cases hand-labelled by an operator.
step.action: Run the LLM judge against the holdout. Compute Cohen's κ. If κ < 0.7, revise judge prompt + reference labels and retry.
step.output: calibration.jsonl + κ value recorded in suite-config.judge.kappa.
step.decision-gate: Block merge until κ ≥ 0.7. Document the κ in the PR description.

step.name: wire-runner
step.action: Use templates/runner.py: parallel worker pool, per-case timeout, retries on transient errors, emit report.json with per-category counts + pass-rate.
step.output: runner script + GitHub Actions / CI workflow that uploads report.json as artifact.
step.decision-gate: Smoke run on a 5-case subset before the full 50-case run.

step.name: set-ci-gate
step.action: Add a PR check: if any category drops >1pp from main, fail merge. Trigger paths: prompts/**, tools/**, model.cfg. Persist baseline in repo (e.g. evals/jailbreak/baseline.json).
step.output: CI workflow + branch protection rule + baseline file.
step.decision-gate: No admin override on the gate; investigate, do not bypass.
